summary: Tested PlayerMessagesPage ThreadPanel feature (Gap: player-side reply flow). All core features verified: thread panel opens on card click, shows coach message bubble, compose box for unreplied messages, reply submit replaces compose with sent bubble, backdrop/close button closes panel, 'Replied' badge shown on card, Profile Views tab regression passes. Backend: 12/13 tests passed.

minor.issue: Returns 500 (Internal Server Error) instead of 404 when message_id is not a valid UUID format. Supabase throws DB exception on invalid UUID. Should catch and return 404.

action_items: Minor: Fix POST /api/player/messages/{id}/reply to return 404 (not 500) for invalid UUID format — wrap Supabase query in try/except and check if result is empty before raising HTTPException(404)
critical_code_review_comments: ThreadPanel: All data-testid attributes present (player-thread-panel, player-thread-backdrop, player-thread-close-btn, player-thread-coach-msg, player-reply-input, player-reply-submit-btn, player-thread-reply-sent, player-thread-programme-link). All functional.
Backend reply endpoint correctly returns 409 on duplicate reply. Mark-read PATCH called on panel open for unread messages.
Reply badge (MessageSquare + 'Replied') correctly shows on message card after submitting reply.
Profile Views tab (data-testid='tab-profile-views', 'profile-views-list') renders correctly after messages tab changes — regression confirmed.
500 error on invalid UUID in reply endpoint — minor fix: catch exception or validate UUID format before DB query.

success_rate.backend: 12/13 (92%) — 1 minor failure (500 vs 404 for invalid UUID)

test_credentials: Player: player@test.com / test1234 | Coach: testcoach@courtbound.edu / coach1234
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test messages from coach to player during testing (TEST_ThreadPanel New, TEST_UI Thread Test). Both messages were replied to during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ThreadPanel is fully functional. Player messages page at /messages. All 12 feature requirements verified. The only issue is 500 vs 404 for invalid UUID in reply endpoint - minor backend fix needed. Player inbox now has 3 messages (all replied). To test compose box, send a new message from testcoach@courtbound.edu to player fda135a9-a554-4ba3-9913-d69644e2132f.
